definitions: adj. 备受赞誉的；享有盛誉的

examples.text: Today on People in the News, our guest is John Williams. The name may not sound familiar to you, but John was once an acclaimed basketball player.
examples.explanation: 今天在《新闻人物》节目中，我们的嘉宾是约翰·威廉姆斯。这个名字可能对你来说不太熟悉，但约翰曾经是一位备受赞誉的篮球运动员。

reviewSessions.example_text: Today on People in the News, our guest is John Williams. The name may not sound familiar to you, but John was once an acclaimed basketball player.
expected_definitions: adj. 备受赞誉的；享有盛誉的
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，符合句中含义。
matched_points: “备受赞誉的”与参考释义完全对应
符合例句中 acclaimed basketball player 的意思
